subject: hwmon: (lm80) fix a missing check of the status of SMBus read
verifier_verdict: MISMATCH(F2.if: seed=0, poc=1) — lenient pass (delta=1 on F2.if)
notes: Seed slice required restructuring to match POC return count: both _buggy/_fixed declared void (each contributes 1 implicit ReturnStmt = 2) so slice was given matching main() returning 0 to reach 2 returns.
First POC iteration (with explicit early return in _fixed) failed verifier with F5.return delta=2; collapsed to if/else block to eliminate extra return, yielding only F2.if delta=1 (lenient pass).
Final query fires once at POC.c:26 inside set_fan_div_buggy on the lm80_read_value call used inside a bitwise-AND expression; silent on set_fan_div_fixed.

Query is generic over the pattern: matches integer-returning *_read_value / *_read_byte / regmap_read / i2c_smbus_read / *_reg_read / *_read_reg / *_read_block / *_read_word / smbus_read* helpers whose return is consumed in arithmetic/bitwise expressions without an IS_ERR / <0 / ! check.
